title: Shopify Developer — Prestige Theme Build (Luxury Golf Brand)
description:
ABOUT US



Luxury Ball Marks is a premium golf ball marker brand. Our markers are built from authentic Swiss watch components, CNC machined in titanium, and carried by players on the PGA Tour, LPGA Tour, and LIV Tour. We sell to high-end golfers and partner with private country clubs across the US. The brand is positioned at the level of Rolex — dark, editorial, confident, no compromise on quality.



---



WHAT THIS PROJECT IS



We need a skilled Shopify developer to build two pages inside the Prestige theme by Maestrooo.



We already have fully designed visual mockups for both pages. The design work is done. Fonts, colors, spacing, copy, section order, animations — all defined in HTML/CSS reference files we will share on day one. Your job is to implement them faithfully inside Prestige.



This is an implementation project, not a design project.



This project requires both native Prestige sections AND custom code. You need to be comfortable with both. Some elements — headlines, copy, images, prices, products — must live in Prestige's editable section system so our team can update them without touching code. Other elements — animations, custom layouts, the ticker bar — require custom CSS and JavaScript and that is expected and accounted for in the scope.



---



THE TWO DELIVERABLES



PAGE 1 — Consumer Homepage

Build our visual mockup into Prestige's homepage template. Includes: sticky nav with backdrop blur, hero section with floating animated product image, scrolling gold ticker bar, asymmetric Best Sellers product grid, On Tour section, High Roller Room teaser, newsletter signup, and footer. All product images are already on our Shopify CDN.



PAGE 2 — B2B Wholesale Landing Page

Build as a standalone Shopify page template — not a product page. Light cream color scheme, separate visual identity from the consumer homepage. Includes: hero with stats row, business case metrics section, deliverables grid with product images, annual edition exclusivity section, three-step process, three-column pricing tiers, credibility section, and a lead capture form that
s 
 INCLUDED IN SCOPE:

- Prestige theme setup: typography (Cormorant Garamond + DM Sans via Google Fonts), color palette, navigation, and global settings configured per mockup

- Mobile responsive: both pages must be flawless on iPhone and Android — no broken grids, no horizontal scrolling

- Cross-browser tested: Chrome, Safari, Firefox minimum

- Loom walkthrough: before the project is considered complete, record a short Loom video walking through both pages and showing how a non-technical person updates key content — headlines, images, products, prices — inside the Shopify editor without code



---



WHAT NEEDS CUSTOM CODE vs WHAT MUST BE NATIVELY EDITABLE



This is the most important part of the brief. Read it carefully.



REQUIRES CUSTOM CSS / JAVASCRIPT (expected and acceptable):

- Scrolling ticker bar animation

- Floating product image animation in the hero

- Custom cursor

- Scroll reveal animations on sections

- Asymmetric product grid layout

- Stats row in the B2B hero

- Business case metrics panel layout

- Decorative gold dividers and border treatments

- Any spacing or typography detail that Prestige's native settings cannot achieve



MUST BE BUILT IN NATIVE PRESTIGE SECTIONS (editable without code):

- All headlines and body copy

- All product images and product assignments

- All pricing information

- Button labels and links

- Section order (must be reorderable by dragging)

- Newsletter signup

- Navigation links

- Footer content

- Form field labels



The rule is simple: if we would ever want to update it, it must be editable in the Shopify theme editor without opening code. If it is purely visual and decorative and would never change, custom code is fine.



---



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Complete visual mockups for both pages — fully designed HTML/CSS reference files with all animations, fonts, colors, spacing, and copy defined. You are not designing or writing anything.

- All copy — every headline, subheadline, body copy, button label, and form field is written and provided.

- All brand assets — logo files and product photography already hosted on Shopify CDN.

- Prestige theme license — we purchase before the project starts.

- Shopify collaborator access from day one.

- Written feedback within 24 hours of every submission.



---



REQUIREMENTS



- Minimum 2 years Shopify theme development

- Strong Liquid templating and Shopify section/block system experience

- Proficient in custom CSS and JavaScript — you will need to implement animations and custom layouts that go beyond Prestige's native capabilities

- Prestige theme experience preferred — if you haven't worked with Prestige, review Maestrooo's documentation and confirm you understand its structure before applying

- Pixel-accurate CSS — you can match exact spacing, font weights, letter spacing, and color values from a reference file

- Mobile-first approach — custom code must be fully responsive, not just the native sections

- Clean, commented code — we may have ongoing work and need to maintain what you build. Custom code must be clearly commented so another developer can understand and edit it later

- Clear English communication — response time under 24 hours during the project

- Cross-browser testing before submitting any deliverable



---



TIMELINE



Day 1–2: Setup. Prestige installed, collaborator access granted, mockups shared, brand assets confirmed, typography and colors configured in theme settings.



Day 7: Consumer homepage submitted for review. All sections and custom elements built, desktop and mobile tested. We return feedback within 24 hours.



Day 12: B2B wholesale page submitted for review. All sections and custom elements built, lead form functional and
ing correctly. We return feedback within 24 hours.



Day 16: All revisions complete. Loom walkthrough delivered. Project closed.



Two rounds of revisions per page are included in the fixed price. Additional revisions beyond two rounds will be billed at your hourly rate.



---



PAYMENT



$75 paid on project start.

$75 paid on final delivery — same day both pages are live, all revisions are complete, and Loom walkthrough is delivered.



We pay the same day. No delays.



---



ONGOING WORK



This is the first project. If you do excellent work, there will be more —
 templates in Klaviyo, seasonal landing pages, product page builds, app integrations, and ongoing maintenance. We bring back developers we trust rather than re-hiring every time. Nothing is guaranteed, but if this goes well, you will be the first person we contact for the next one.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic application. Answer these five things specifically. Applications that skip any of these will not be read.



1. TWO LIVE SHOPIFY STORES YOU BUILT

URLs only — not screenshots. We will visit them. If you built a store with another developer, say so and describe your specific contribution.



2. ONE EXAMPLE OF CONVERTING A DESIGN INTO SHOPIFY

Describe a specific project where you took a design file, mockup, or visual reference and built it into a live Shopify theme — including any custom CSS or JavaScript you wrote. What was the hardest part?



3. CUSTOM ANIMATION OR INTERACTION YOU HAVE BUILT

Describe one specific CSS animation or JavaScript interaction you have implemented on a Shopify store. What was it, how did you build it, and does it still work on mobile?



4. PRESTIGE THEME

Have you worked with Prestige by Maestrooo before? If yes, describe the project. If no, confirm you have reviewed their documentation and understand how its section and custom code structure works.



5. YOUR QUOTE AND TIMELINE

Confirm the $150 fixed price and 16-day timeline, or give us your number with a reason. A quote significantly below $150 raises questions about whether you have understood the scope.



---



IMPORTANT — PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING



We are not looking for the cheapest option. We are looking for the right person. This project requires someone who is equally comfortable working inside Shopify's visual editor and writing clean custom code — and who knows exactly which approach to use for which element.



The mockups make this significantly easier than a build from scratch. The design decisions, the copy, the animations — all defined. What we need is someone who executes with precision and communicates clearly.



If you rush it or build shortcuts we have to undo later, there is no ongoing relationship. If you do excellent work, there is a real one.



Fixed Price: $150 USD

Timeline: 16 days

Payment: $75 start / $75 delivery

title: Customer Success Representative
description:

You'll stay ahead of them, guide them through their courses and programs, and make sure they're moving forward every step of the way. If you genuinely love people and want to see them win, this role was made for you.



What You'll Do:



1. Client Success & Progress Tracking:

   a. Proactively monitor how each client is progressing across multiple program components, each with their own recurring timelines

   b. Reach out consistently — clients often won't ask for what they need, so you bring it to them

   c. Congratulate clients when they hit milestones

   d. Encourage and re-engage clients who fall behind



2. Onboarding:

   a. Onboard new clients into the program

   b. Set up their GHL account and get them fully started

   c. Make them feel welcomed and clear on next steps from day one



3. 6-Week Accelerator Support:

   a. Ensure clients show up each week

   b. Make sure they have the right information to complete the work

   c. Coach them through each stage of the accelerator — think of yourself as their guide, not just their rep



4. Issue Resolution:

   a. You are not responsible for fixing technical or program issues, but you are responsible for identifying them and getting the right tea
mber to resolve them quickly

   b. Be the client's advocate internally



Who You Are:

> You genuinely care about people and their success — this isn't just a job task, it's a personality trait

> You get to know each client personally and advocate on their behalf

> You're proactive, not reactive — you follow through without being asked



Skills:

+ Outstanding communication — warm, clear, and consistent

+ Highly organized with strong follow-through

+ Comfortable working across
, SMS/Text, and Zoom

+ Able to manage multiple clients and timelines simultaneously



A Note on This Role: 

This is a part-time role. Also, this is a new program, which means the communication systems and workflows are still being built. You'll play a key role in helping shape how client communication runs. If you thrive in a building environment and enjoy creating structure, this is a great opportunity.



Please answer the following when you apply:

1. Tell us about a time you proactively reached out to a client or customer before they knew they needed help. What happened and what was the outcome?

2. How do you personally stay organized when managing multiple clients or projects with different timelines? Walk us through your system.

3. This role requires a lot of heart — you'll be celebrating wins and nudging people who are falling behind. How do you naturally show up for people, and why does that matter to you?

4. Is $5/hr acceptable for you?

title: Account Assistant/ Bookkeeper
description:
**Job Title:** Bookkeeper (Xero) – Real Estate / Property Management



**Location:** Remote - Philippines ( Working with Uk - based company)

**Type:** Full-time 



---



 About Us



We are a UK-based real estate group managing multiple property entities across London. Our portfolio includes residential and commercial properties with assets worth several million pounds. As our portfolio continues to grow, we are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented **Bookkeeper with strong Xero experience** to support the day-to-day financial operations of the group.



 Role Overview



The successful candidate will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records across multiple entities and ensuring daily bookkeeping and reconciliations are completed efficiently. Experience in the **real estate or property management sector** would be beneficial but is not essential.



This role requires someone who is comfortable handling high volumes of transactions and property-related income ensuring that rents, property costs, and development transactions are recorded accurately across multiple companies.



---



##Key Responsibilities



* Daily **bank reconciliations in Xero**

* Posting and reconciling **supplier invoices, expenses, and receipts

* Preparing and posting **manual journals, recurring journals, accruals, and prepayments**

* Managing **intercompany / dual-company transactions**

* Monitoring **tenant rent payments** and ensuring rent receipts are recorded correctly

* Reconciling **rent income schedules across multiple properties**

* Handling **rent period allocations** (e.g., when rent received mid-month covers part of the previous period and part of the current period)

* Accurately allocating rental income across **correct accounting periods**

* Managing bookkeeping for **multiple entities within the group**

* Maintaining and organising the **Xero chart of accounts**

* Ensuring proper allocation between **Balance Sheet and Profit & Loss accounts**

* Recording and reconciling **property purchases and property sales transactions**

* Correctly allocating **purchase price, legal fees, stamp duty, and acquisition costs** to the appropriate accounts

* Recording **agent fees, legal costs, and other selling costs** when properties are sold

* Ensuring property acquisition and disposal costs are posted using the **correct chart of accounts**

* Supporting the preparation of **monthly management accounts**

* Assisting with **year-end preparation and supporting external accountants**

* Ensuring all bookkeeping records remain **accurate, reconciled, and up to date**



---



###Required Skills & Experience



* Strong working knowledge of **Xero accounting software**

* Proven experience in **bookkeeping and financial record keeping**

* Strong experience with **daily bank reconciliation**

* Ability to reconcile **high volumes of transactions across multiple entities**

* Experience managing **rent income across large property portfolios**

* Strong understanding of **journals, accruals, prepayments, and recurring entries**

* Familiarity with **intercompany accounting**

* Strong understanding of **Profit & Loss vs Balance Sheet postings**

* Ability to work with and manage a **structured chart of accounts**

* **Strong Excel skills**, including working with large datasets, reconciliation schedules, and financial tracking

* High attention to detail and strong organisational skills

* Ability to **work under pressure and meet deadlines**



---



### Preferred (but not essential)



* Experience in **real estate, property management, or property development accounting**

* Experience managing **tenant ledgers or rental income tracking**

* Understanding of **property acquisition and disposal accounting**

* Experience working with **multi-entity business structures**



---



### What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who is proactive, organised, and capable of managing a **high volume of transactions across multiple property entities**. The ideal candidate will ensure that **daily Xero reconciliations are completed accurately**, rental income is correctly allocated across accounting periods, and property transactions are recorded correctly using the appropriate accounts.



If you have strong **Xero bookkeeping experience** and are comfortable working in a fast-paced property environment, we would love to hear from you.

title: Executive & Marketing Coordinator
description:
EXECUTIVE & MARKETING COORDINATOR

Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term



ABOUT FUNNEL DIGITAL MARKETING



Funnel Digital Marketing is a performance marketing agency that brings Fortune 500-level expertise to small and medium-sized businesses. We specialize in paid search, SEO, programmatic advertising, and social media, and we are known for being data-driven, transparent, and genuinely invested in our clients' success. While large agencies reserve their best talent for their biggest accounts, we give every client access to senior-level strategy and execution from day one.



The agency was founded in 2018 and is led by Kenneth Hamner, who has nearly 20 years of experience in digital marketing. Prior to founding Funnel, Kenneth held leadership roles at some of the industry's most respected agencies, including 22squared, 360i, ROI DNA, and Edelman, managing paid search programs with budgets exceeding $100 million annually and building marketing practices from the ground up. He launched Funnel to bring that same caliber of expertise to businesses that have historically been underserved by the agency world.



Today, Funnel works with clients across a range of industries, delivering measurable results through strategies that are grounded in data and built around each client's specific goals. The agency is growing, and this hire is a key part of that growth.



THE OPPORTUNITY



We are looking for a sharp, reliable, and proactive Executive & Marketing Coordinator to work directly with the founder. This is a full-time, fully remote role designed for someone who wants to grow with a company long-term.

You will touch nearly every part of the business: helping win new clients, supporting existing accounts, managing content and social media, keeping operations running smoothly, and handling personal administrative tasks for the founder. No two days will look exactly the same.



This role is built for someone who takes ownership. If you are the type of person who notices something needs to be done and does it without being asked, you will thrive here.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



AGENCY OPERATIONS & ADMINISTRATION

Manage the founder's
 inbox: triage, draft responses, flag urgent items, keep it organized

Maintain calendar, schedule meetings, and coordinate across time zones

Develop and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for recurring tasks

Help onboard new employees and contractors with documentation and coordination

Keep Google Drive organized and files easy to find



BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT & CLIENT SUPPORT

Research prospective clients before outreach: company background, budget signals, competitors

Format and assemble client proposals from templates

Draft outreach
s and LinkedIn messages for new business

Maintain the prospect pipeline tracker and follow up on open proposals

Coordinate client onboarding: welcome
s, access setup, kickoff preparation

Support client reporting by pulling data from Google Ads and Analytics into templates

Track deadlines and deliverables across active client accounts



Note: These responsibilities are included in this role on an interim basis. Funnel plans to hire a dedicated Business Development specialist to own this function. Once that hire is made, this role will provide support in these areas.



CONTENT, SOCIAL MEDIA & MARKETING

Manage and grow Funnel's 
 and
 presence

Write and schedule social media posts from talking points, briefs, or voice notes

Create graphics using Canva templates

Engage with followers, respond to comments, and grow the community organically

Maintain a content calendar and ensure consistent posting cadence

Write SEO-focused blog posts for the agency website (2 per month)

Develop and send a monthly company newsletter: curated industry content, agency updates, and client wins

Repurpose existing content (articles, case studies, presentations) across channels



COMPETITOR & MARKET TRACKING

Monitor competing agencies on a monthly basis: what they are posting, how they are positioning their services, what offers or messaging they are leading with, and where they appear to be winning or losing ground

Compile findings into a brief monthly summary for the founder

This intelligence directly informs how Funnel positions itself in proposals and marketing



MARKETING MATERIALS & CASE STUDY DEVELOPMENT

Own the development and maintenance of Funnel's library of client-facing marketing materials

Turn completed client engagements into formatted case studies for the website and proposals

Keep service one-pagers and capability decks current and ensure all materials reflect the agency's current offerings and positioning

Work from campaign data, notes, and results provided by the founder and subject matter experts; your job is to shape that raw material into polished, professional content that helps win new business



TEAM COORDINATION

Ensure tea
mbers and contractors are moving forward on their deliverables

Flag blockers or delays to the founder proactively

Help document processes as the team grows



GOOGLE BUSINESS PROFILE MANAGEMENT

Keep Funnel's Google Business Profile active and optimized

Post regular updates, ensure all business information stays accurate, and monitor and respond to reviews promptly

Flag anything that needs the founder's attention

A well-maintained profile supports local visibility and builds credibility with prospective clients who are evaluating the agency



CLIENT SATISFACTION & RETENTION OUTREACH

On a monthly or quarterly basis, send a brief, personal check-in to active clients: not a survey, just a genuine touchpoint asking how things are going and whether there is anything the agency can be doing better

Log responses and flag any concerns to the founder immediately

This habit strengthens client relationships, surfaces issues before they become cancellations, and reinforces that Funnel is a partner, not just a vendor



PERSONAL SUPPORT FOR THE FOUNDER (SECONDARY & AD HOC)

Various task completions for personal projects

Personal scheduling and appointment coordination

Note: Personal tasks are secondary to agency work and assigned on an ad hoc basis. They will not dominate your time, but flexibility and attention are appreciated when they arise.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Required:



Exceptional written and spoken English

Strong organizational skills and an ability to manage multiple priorities without dropping anything

Proactive communicator who sends updates without being asked and flags problems early

Proficient in Google Workspace: Gmail, Google Docs, Sheets, Drive, Calendar

Must be available and working during full US Eastern business hours (9am to 5pm ET, Monday through Friday) -- this is a hard requirement

Reliable internet connection and your own computer



Strongly Preferred:



Experience with Google Ads or Google Analytics (reporting level at minimum)

Familiarity with Canva, Slack, and the task manager Asana

Experience managing social media accounts professionally

Prior experience as a VA or executive assistant for a US-based business



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



Success in this role is not measured by hours logged or tasks checked off. It is measured by the degree to which Kenneth can focus on the highest-value work of running and growing the agency, knowing that everything behind him is handled.



In your first 30 days, the goal is to learn. You will absorb how the business operates, who the clients are, what the recurring responsibilities look like, and how Kenneth thinks and communicates. You will complete assigned tasks accurately and on time, ask good questions when something is unclear, and establish a daily rhythm that Kenneth can count on. By the end of the first month, he trusts your judgment on routine decisions and does not need to check behind you on the basics.



By 60 days, you are no longer just executing tasks. You are starting to anticipate them. You know what needs to happen each week without being told, you are managing your own priorities effectively, and you are communicating proactively when something is at risk of slipping. You have identified at least a few areas where a process could be tighter or a task could be done more efficiently, and you have said so.



By 90 days, you are a genuine operational partner. Kenneth spends less time on administrative work, client coordination, and content than he did before you joined. You are flagging problems before they become urgent, suggesting improvements without being asked, and handling your full scope of responsibilities with minimal oversight. The business runs better because you are in it.



Long-term, the ceiling on this role is not fixed. As Funnel grows, the complexity and scope of this position will grow with it. There will be opportunities to take on greater responsibility, potentially lead other tea
mbers, and advance into a more senior role. The person who succeeds here will not be someone who views this as a job. This will be a career.



COMPENSATION & WORKING ENVIRONMENT



This is not a temporary or trial engagement. The goal is a long-term working relationship built on trust, clear communication, and shared success. Kenneth is looking for someone who wants to build something with him and grow alongside the business for years, not months.



Compensation will increase significantly over time as your contributions and the agency's revenue grow. Kenneth believes the people who help build a company's success should share in that success, and that commitment is genuine.



Hours: Full-time, 40 hours per week, Monday through Friday, during regular US Eastern business hours (approximately 9am to 5pm ET). You must be available and fully responsive throughout the business day. This is a hard requirement, and candidates who cannot commit to these hours will not be considered.



Work Style: This is a fully remote position. Day-to-day communication happens primarily through Slack and
, with recurring scheduled video check-ins with Kenneth and ad hoc calls as needed. You will not be sitting in meetings all day. Most of your time will be spent doing focused, independent work with clear direction and defined priorities. The expectation is that you take ownership of your task list and manage your time well without being prompted.



Culture: Kenneth leads by example and treats every person he works with the way he wants to be treated. He is direct, responsive, and open to feedback. He will not hover over your work or second-guess every decision you make, but he will hold you to a high standard and expect you to do the same for yourself. If something is not working, he wants to know. If he drops the ball on his end, he expects you to tell him. This is a relationship built on honesty, and that goes both ways.



Growth: As Funnel takes on more clients and the team expands, this role will grow with it. The person hired for this position has the opportunity to take on greater responsibility, lead other tea
mbers, and advance into a more senior role over time. This is not a dead-end position. It is a foundation.



HOW TO APPLY



To show that you are serious about this role and have read this information, please submit 10 application points even you reach out.

title: Litigation Support Assistant (Personal Injury – Remote)
description:
We are a growing U.S. law firm seeking a highly organized Litigation Support Assistant to help manage and organize personal injury litigation cases. This role focuses on keeping litigation files organized, tracking deadlines, and supporting the attorney with document management and case preparation.

This position is remote and ideal for someone with experience supporting litigation teams or working in a legal administrative role.

Responsibilities

• Organize and maintain litigation case files

• Track court deadlines and update case calendars

• Prepare and organize discovery document folders

• Assist with document production and file management

• Organize medical records and exhibits for litigation

• Coordinate scheduling for depositions and case-related meetings

• Maintain case status trackers and update internal systems

• Ensure litigation files remain organized and up to date

• Assist with preparing files for mediation, settlement discussions, and trial preparation

Requirements

• Prior experience supporting a law firm or litigation team preferred

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Ability to track deadlines and manage multiple cases at once

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• Comfortable working with digital document systems and case management software

• Ability to work independently and follow structured workflows

Nice to Have

• Experience with personal injury cases

• Familiarity with litigation processes such as discovery and depositions

• Experience organizing medical records or exhibits

• Experience using legal case management software

Work Structure

• Remote position

• Flexible part-time hours to start (approximately 10–20 hours per week)

• Opportunity to grow into a larger role as the firm continues to expand

About Our Firm

We are a boutique law firm representing personal injury clients and business owners. Our team values organization, clear communication, and providing an exceptional experience for our clients. We are looking for someone who enjoys building systems and helping cases move forward efficiently.

“Describe your experience supporting litigation cases and how you stay organized when tracking deadlines.”

title: Ad creative editor
description:
We’re Hiring! 

Image / Video Ad Creative Editor (E-commerce – Health & Beauty)



We run a fast-growing e-commerce brand in the health and beauty space. We sell our products through our own Shopify store and scale primarily through Meta 
 & Instagram) ads. The brand is growing fast, and I’m looking to bring on a strong creative editor to help us scale further.



I’m looking for someone who understands performance-driven creatives. Not just someone who can edit nicely, but someone who understands what makes ads convert.



Your Role:



You will be responsible for creating and iterating image and video ad creatives for Meta ads. This includes:



* Creating new ad concepts from scratch

* Iterating on winning creatives

* Testing different hooks, angles, and structures

* Producing high-converting short-form videos

* Working closely with me to improve performance over time



This is not just design work. This is direct response creative work.



What I’m Looking For:



* Proven experience with e-commerce ad creatives

* Strong understanding of Meta ads and paid social structure

* Experience with direct response marketing principles

* Ability to think in hooks, scroll stoppers, problem-solution angles, and UGC-style formats

* Someone who understands ad iteration and testing frameworks



Tools I Expect You to Be Comfortable With



* ElevenLabs (AI voiceovers)

* Higgsfield

* Nano Banana

* Canva

* ChatGPT



I am not looking for editors who rely on Veed.



You should be able to work independently, take feedback well, and continuously improve creatives based on performance data.



What You Get



* Long-term opportunity with a growing brand

* Consistent work

* Room to grow as the brand scales

* Performance-driven environment



If you’re interested, send:



* Examples of previous e-commerce ad creatives

* Results you’ve achieved (if available)

* The tools you use

* Your availability

* Your rate



I’m looking to move fast and hire the right person as soon as possible. Let's grow together.

title: Bookkeeper
description:
Blackacre Property Management is seeking a detail-oriented and organized Bookkeeper to manage the financial records of our properties. This role focuses on accurate bookkeeping, reconciliation, and financial reporting to support smooth operations and informed decision-making.





Key Responsibilities:

-Process monthly mortgage statements, bank statements, and receipts.

- Record all financial transactions accurately using journal entries.

- Reconcile accounts and ensure all records are balanced and up-to-date.

- Prepare financial statements, including:

  1. Cash flow statements

  2. Income statements (profit & loss)

  3. Balance sheets

- Monitor and track expenses and revenue to ensure accurate financial reporting.

- Assist with budgeting, forecasting, and other ad hoc financial analysis as needed.

- Maintain organized and accurate digital financial records.





Qualifications:



Proven bookkeeping experience, preferably in real estate or property management.



Proficiency with accounting software-  AppFolio



Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial statements.



Detail-oriented, organized, and able to manage multiple tasks accurately.



Ability to work independently and communicate effectively regarding financial matters.



Bachelor's degree in accounting

title: Short-Form Video Creator (Paid Trial, Long-Term Opportunity)
description:
We're a fast-growing app company looking for someone reliable to create short-form videos daily using our custom internal tool.



You will use our custom internal tool to generate AI videos, then edit and finalize them in CapCut. All instructions, templates, and prompts are provided. Your job is to follow the process, edit the videos to a high standard, and submit them for approval.



How It Works



1) Trial Period: 2 weeks, 20 videos total (roughly 1-2 per day)

2) Pay: $5 per approved video ($100 for the full trial if all 20 are approved)

IMPORTANT: If your videos are good quality, you will move into a full-time creator role with more accounts, more volume, and higher monthly earnings



What You'll Do



1) Log into our internal dashboard

2) Follow provided workflows to generate AI-powered short-form videos

3) Submit completed videos for approval

4) Make adjustments if a video is not approved

5) Flag any tool issues or errors via



Requirements



- Proficient in CapCut (this is non-negotiable)

- Reliable internet connection

- Computer or laptop (not phone-based)

- Detail-oriented and able to follow video instructions exactly

- Comfortable learning new web-based tools quickly

- Can start within 1 week



Nice to Have (Not Required)



- Experience with AI tools or content generation platforms

How We Work

 (no calls or meetings)

To Apply

Start your application with the word "mango" so we know you read the full posting. Tell us briefly about your experience with web-based tools and your daily availability.
salary: 5 / video trial - 500 a month full time
